programme.title: Krushnaichya Leki
programme.desc: S1 , E10 : Facing abandonment and pain, a resilient single mother and her three daughters stand united and strong, weathering life's various challenges with perseverance and grace.

programme.title: Sanai Chaughade
programme.desc: S1 , E97 : A simple car ride takes an unexpected turn when Jay offers Sharvari a lift. Amidst the falling rain, the two find unexpected joy and share a series of intimate moments.

programme.title: Kamali
programme.desc: S1 , E350 : A courageous kabaddi champion hailing from the countryside of Maharashtra challenges her family's expectations by venturing to Mumbai in pursuit of her aspirations.

programme.title: Veen Doghantali Hi Tutena
programme.desc: S1 , E310 : Swanandi and Samar marry for convenience. Over time, their bond deepens with trust, love, and understanding, proving that love can grow unexpectedly.

programme.desc: S1 , E282 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

programme.title: Aagaman
programme.desc: A dedicated farmer wages a fierce battle against a corrupt businessman to defend the rights of his community. He soon joins forces with his lawyer son to strengthen their legal fight.

programme.title: Noyonmoni
programme.desc: Nayan's house catches fire after he is born, which makes people believe that he is a bad omen. His life changes drastically when his father is arrested.

programme.title: Madhu Malati
programme.desc: Malati, a rich landowner's daughter, and Debi, a simpleton, fall for Madhu, a popular man. However, he sees Debi as his friend and falls for Malati whose father has her betrothed to Rajesh, a thug.

programme.title: Bidrohini Naari
programme.desc: Saathi, a rebel, marries a rich man named Partho, but his family fails to welcome her. However, when her maid gets molested by her brother-in-law, she raises her voice against her in-laws.

programme.title: Kamalar Banabas
programme.desc: Banished from the kingdom under false pretences, Kamala endures hardship while raising her son, determined to clear her name and reunite with her loved ones.

programme.title: Anutap
programme.desc: A singer falls in love with a village beauty, and soon they get married. However, their marital bliss is dampened when they are separated due to an unfortunate event.

programme.title: Bachchan
programme.desc: Bachchan, a huge fan of Amitabh Bachchan, falls in love with a colonel's daughter and tries to woo her. Later, he finds a mobile which belongs to a ruthless gangster and starts blackmailing him.

programme.title: Abiswasi
programme.desc: Satyaki Sen, a successful businessman, finds his life ruined when his family is kidnapped by a few thugs who are out for revenge.

programme.title: Aankhen
programme.desc: After being sacked from his position as a bank manager, a temperamental man plots revenge by orchestrating a robbery, enlisting three unlikely accomplices.

programme.title: Koi ... Mil Gaya
programme.desc: A young man with special needs is influenced by his father's scientific work. He encounters an alien who grants him extraordinary abilities and transforms his life.

programme.title: Mujhse Shaadi Karogi
programme.desc: Sameer struggles with anger issues that complicate his personal life and relationships. His world takes an unexpected turn when he meets Rani.

programme.title: Kedarnath
programme.desc: After a Muslim porter falls in love with the rebellious daughter of a Hindu priest, their love is tested due to misunderstandings and a natural disaster.

programme.title: Maine Pyaar Kyun Kiya
programme.desc: Sameer lies to his girlfriend, Sonia, about being in an unhappy marriage. However, when he falls in love with her, she asks to meet his estranged wife, putting him in a predicament.

programme.title: Highway
programme.desc: Veera, a young bride-to-be, is abducted by a local gangster, Mahabir, and his men a day prior to her wedding. Far from being terrified of her abductor, Veera discovers a new meaning to her life.

programme.title: Lost
programme.desc: A journalist relentlessly investigates to uncover the truth behind the sudden and mysterious disappearance of a young activist.

programme.title: Chandu Champion
programme.desc: An extraordinary man confronts relentless challenges with unwavering determination. His spirit and resilience propel him through adversity, ultimately forging a path to historic achievement.

programme.title: Sholay
programme.desc: Jai and Veeru, two ex-convicts, are hired by Thakur Baldev Singh, a retired policeman, to help him nab Gabbar Singh, a notorious dacoit, who has spread havoc in the village of Ramgarh.

programme.title: Shamitabh
programme.desc: A mute man who dreams of becoming an actor and a man come together for a purpose, but their differences cause them to drift apart due to their egos.

programme.title: Dark Chocolate
programme.desc: This thriller murder mystery is an adaptation of the real life murder case of Sheena Bora. The discovery of a charred corpse in the woods, leads to a high-profile murder investigation.

programme.title: Break Ke Baad
programme.desc: Aaliya is not ready for commitment even after a decade-long friendship with Abhay. She remains indifferent when he follows her to Australia but is finally shaken when he announces his wedding.
